rationale: Both evaluations land on the same score (4/10) and the same substantive reasoning: insufficient C++ experience versus the 8-year requirement, no cloud compute/distributed systems leadership at scale, and lack of infrastructure architecture leadership. The wording differs but the strengths, concerns, and justification map one-to-one. None of the variant's reasoning references location, geography, nationality, or any signal derived from the Berlin-to-San-Francisco change; the differences are ordinary rewording within run-to-run noise.
